organic.title: Software Engineer Salary in Bangalore - AmbitionBox
organic.snippet: Average Software Engineer salary in Bangalore is ₹8.4 Lakhs per year for less than 1 year of experience to 6 years. Software Engineer salary in Bangalore ranges between ₹3.0 Lakhs to ₹14.5 Lakhs based on 47,521 latest salaries received from various Software Engineers across industries.
